## What

Short description of what changed.

## Why

What problem this solves or what it enables. Reference the roadmap item if applicable.

## How

Key design decisions, especially if they deviate from existing patterns.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `uv run pytest`
- [ ] New features have tests
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If user-facing config changed, docs updated (`styles/_README.md`, `inputs/_TEMPLATE.md`, etc.)
- [ ] If architecture changed, `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` updated
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits

## Related

- Closes #
- Part of V2 / V3 / V4 (circle one)
